'''Romm''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Delantine system/Legends|Delantine system]] with a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. [[Trux Zissu]] intended to rally support from Romm, but was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] when he entered the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. From [[Da'nor]], another planet in the system, [[Stuart Zissu]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[4B-X]] were directed to go to Romm.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]''
